choices.text: Indirect costs project-wide: PM + super salaries, site office, port-a-johns, dumpsters, temp utilities, security, phones. Typically 6-15% of direct cost. Often forgotten by inexperienced estimators.

Bid bond (1% project, guarantees contractor signs if awarded), Performance bond (50-100% project value, guarantees completion), Payment bond (guarantees subs paid). Costs 1-3% of bonded amount. Required for public + most large private projects.

questions.explanation: Bid + Performance + Payment bonds for large projects.
